findings.title: Removed httpOnly flag from accessCookie
findings.evidence: accessCookie httpOnly: true was removed, allowing scripts to read the session cookie via XSS

findings.title: Removed secure flag from refreshCookie
findings.evidence: refreshCookie secure: true was removed, allowing transmission over unencrypted HTTP connections

findings.title: Downgraded sameSite from Strict to None on csrfCookie
findings.evidence: csrfCookie sameSite changed from 'Strict' to 'None', restoring CSRF vulnerability

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
